overall.description: A cinematic driving sequence through Night City in Cyberpunk 2077, beginning in an industrial urban corridor beneath elevated highways, transitioning through a graffiti-covered underpass, emerging into desert outskirts with mountain views, and returning to dense urban infrastructure. The footage features golden hour lighting with long shadows and warm tones characteristic of the game's ray-traced visuals.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial urban corridor beneath elevated highways

events.description: vehicle navigates a slight right curve under the overpass system
passing industrial silo structures on the right side of the road

agents.ego_description: driving through an industrial corridor beneath multiple levels of highway overpasses, following the flow of traffic

notable_agents.action: red sedan driving ahead in the same lane, maintaining steady speed

entered.detail: multi-level concrete highway structure casting long shadows across the road
tall cylindrical industrial structure with metallic exterior
massive support column for the overhead highway system
tall glass and steel tower visible in the distance between overpasses

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a vehicle driving through a semi-covered industrial corridor beneath a complex network of elevated highways. Massive concrete pillars line the road while futuristic skyscrapers are visible in the distance. The lighting is warm golden hour sun filtering through the overpass structure, casting long shadows across the asphalt.

events.description: entering deeply shaded underpass beneath building structure, significant darkening of scene
large American flag themed graffiti becomes visible on the right wall

agents.ego_description: navigating through a narrow enclosed underpass, passing beneath building overhangs with graffiti art on the walls

entered.detail: underside of building structure forming a roof over the roadway
concrete wall covered in colorful street art and murals
large mural depicting American flag pattern with stars and stripes
vertical metal ladder attached to the wall structure

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a narrow enclosed underpass beneath building structures, transitioning from partial sky visibility to complete cover. The lighting shifts to low light with artificial illumination. The walls feature prominent graffiti art including a large American flag mural. The space feels industrial and confined compared to the previous open corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: open road with concrete retaining walls transitioning to desert outskirts

events.description: exiting the enclosed underpass into open air with bright sunlight
landscape opens to reveal distant mountain ranges on the horizon
passing burning debris or small fire on the right side of the road

agents.ego_description: accelerating along an open road with concrete retaining walls, transitioning from urban industrial to desert outskirts environment

notable_agents.action: red van driving ahead, occasionally braking as the road curves

entered.detail: tall angled concrete wall with weathered surface and graffiti remnants
utility poles with multiple electrical wires spanning across the road
distant desert mountains with warm golden hour lighting
tall modern street lamp with rectangular fixture

segments.scene_description: The vehicle emerges from the underpass into bright open air, revealing a dramatic transition from urban infrastructure to desert landscape. A tall concrete retaining wall lines the right side while power lines stretch overhead. The scene opens to reveal distant mountains bathed in golden hour light, and the vehicle passes burning debris on the roadside as it follows a red van toward the city outskirts.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert highway intersection with distant city views

events.description: approaching and passing through an intersection with traffic lights
turning left at intersection to reveal expansive desert landscape with city skyline

agents.ego_description: navigating a desert highway intersection, turning to follow the road alongside the city perimeter with mountain backdrop

entered.detail: arid landscape with sparse desert vegetation and dry soil
standard traffic signal showing red light at the intersection
metal safety barrier along the left edge of the road
large digital advertisement screen displaying colorful graphics

segments.scene_description: The vehicle travels through a wide-open desert highway environment, approaching an intersection with traffic controls. After navigating the intersection, the scene opens to reveal an expansive view of the desert outskirts with the futuristic city skyline visible to the left and mountains dominating the background. The road is bordered by guardrails and desert terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated urban highway with multiple overpass levels

events.description: re-entering dense urban infrastructure with complex elevated highway systems
pedestrian visible walking on the right side of the road near barriers

agents.ego_description: driving along a multi-lane highway beneath elevated overpasses, approaching the dense urban core with futuristic architecture

notable_agents.action: person walking along the roadside near concrete barriers in the distance

entered.detail: concrete and metal barriers separating lanes and sidewalk areas
low-rise industrial structure with weathered exterior near the highway

segments.scene_description: The final segment returns to dense urban infrastructure, driving beneath a complex network of elevated highways and overpasses. The road is lined with barriers and industrial buildings while futuristic skyscrapers rise in the distance. The lighting remains warm golden hour, casting long shadows from the overhead structures. A pedestrian appears walking along the roadside as the vehicle continues toward the city center.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive that transitions from a claustrophobic industrial corridor through a desolate desert expanse before returning to the dense urban core. It begins beneath a network of elevated highways where golden hour sunlight filters through concrete pillars and distant skyscrapers. As the vehicle enters a narrow, dimly lit underpass, the open sky vanishes and the environment shifts to a confined space adorned with graffiti and artificial lights. The scene then bursts open into bright daylight, revealing a dramatic shift to a desert landscape with burning roadside debris and distant mountains before the road widens into an expansive highway overlooking the city skyline. Finally, the camera moves back into the city's heavy infrastructure, gliding beneath complex overpasses and past industrial buildings and pedestrians as the warm evening light casts long shadows across the asphalt.
